summary: M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 is closed after the accepted M7 UI/localization/visual quality-track plan entered origin/main through PR #173. The task created and reviewed the downstream M7 UI/localization task graph and preserved all Human Gate boundaries, including formal content lock, cloud-save implementation, telemetry/accounts/secrets, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, irreversible migration, frozen architecture changes, release/commercial/branding decisions, and manual node battle reversal.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.

decisions.decision: Close M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 only after PR #173 entered origin/main.
After closure, run taskctl ready and start the next highest-priority dependency-ready M7 task without bypassing Human Gates.

risks.summary: Multiple UI/localization tasks become ready after this planning closure.
risks.mitigation: Respect dependency order and avoid overlapping writer ownership in the same app/package area.

requested_action: Synchronize main after closure PR, then start the next dependency-ready M7 task.
